Name: search-records
Description: Full-text search for records (people, companies, deals, etc.) by name, email, domain, or other indexed attributes.

object_type.description: Optional object type to filter by (e.g. 'people', 'companies', 'deals')

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

Name: get-records-by-ids
Description: Retrieve full details for specific records by their IDs.

record_ids.description: Array of record IDs to retrieve

Name: create-record
Description: Create a new record (person, company, deal, or custom object).

object_type.description: The type of record to create (e.g. 'people', 'companies', 'deals')

attributes.description: Key-value pairs of attribute values for the new record

Name: upsert-record
Description: Create or update a record using a matching attribute (e.g., email or domain).

object_type.description: The type of record to upsert (e.g. 'people', 'companies', 'deals')

matching_attribute.description: The attribute to match on for finding existing records (e.g. 'email', 'domain')

Name: list-attribute-definitions
Description: List all attributes available on an object type, including their types and valid options.

object_type.description: The object type to list attributes for (e.g. 'people', 'companies', 'deals')

Name: create-note
Description: Create a new note attached to a record.

record_id.description: The ID of the record to attach the note to

content.description: The body content of the note in markdown

Name: search-notes-by-metadata
Description: Search notes by parent record, author, meeting, or creation time.

created_after.description: Filter for notes created after this ISO 8601 date

created_before.description: Filter for notes created before this ISO 8601 date

Name: semantic-search-notes
Description: Find notes by topic using AI-powered semantic search.

Name: get-note-body
Description: Retrieve the full content of a specific note.

note_id.description: The ID of the note to retrieve

Name: create-task
Description: Create a new task with optional deadline, assignee, and linked record.

assignee_id.description: Optional workspace member ID to assign the task to

record_id.description: Optional record ID to link the task to

Name: update-task
Description: Update a task's deadline, status, assignee, or linked record.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to update

Name: search-meetings
Description: Search past and upcoming meetings by participants, related records, or time range.

start_after.description: Filter for meetings starting after this ISO 8601 date

start_before.description: Filter for meetings starting before this ISO 8601 date

Name: search-call-recordings-by-metadata
Description: Search call recordings by participants, related records, title, or time range.

start_after.description: Filter for recordings after this ISO 8601 date

start_before.description: Filter for recordings before this ISO 8601 date

Name: semantic-search-call-recordings
Description: Find call recordings by topic using AI-powered semantic search.

Name: get-call-recording
Description: Retrieve full details and transcript of a specific call recording.

call_recording_id.description: The ID of the call recording to retrieve

Name: search-emails-by-metadata
Description: Search emails by participants, domain, or time range.

sent_after.description: Filter for emails sent after this ISO 8601 date

sent_before.description: Filter for emails sent before this ISO 8601 date

Name: semantic-search-emails
Description: Find emails by topic using AI-powered semantic search.

Name: get-email-content
Description: Retrieve the full body of a specific email.

email_id.description: The ID of the email to retrieve

Name: list-workspace-members
Description: List members in the workspace with their details and team memberships.

Name: list-workspace-teams
Description: List all teams in the workspace.

Name: whoami
Description: Get information about the current user's identity and workspace membership.
